character.name: Penitent
character.prompt: massive hunched corrupted figure bound in dark obsidian-black stone, vivid deep crimson cracks glowing through the stone surface like fractured lava, enormous fists dragging on ground, shoulders drooping under immense guilt, visible anti-heal aura as dark ripples emanating from body, obsidian black body with bright crimson-red crack lines and faint blue-purple rift energy at edges, oppressive heavy silhouette, NOT plain grey stone NOT generic golem, emergent dark fantasy enemy, RIMA universe
